example_project.name: VibeKB
example_project.note: This is VibeKB's own living software model — VibeKB explaining VibeKB. The source it describes is THIS repository (cubixmeow-commits/VibeKB). Bundled example models of other applications live under examples/ (see examples/sousmeow/.vibekb) and are NOT the active model; do not confuse them with the current state of VibeKB.

provenance.name: VibeKB
provenance.verification_scope: The content loader, dynamic guide, static generator, validator, topology test, and self-maintenance CLI were traced from source in this repository. Diagram topology (architecture, content-load-flow) is verified-from-source. Homepage layout verified by rendering index.php (section order problem → install → understanding → proof; install commands checked against install.php / INSTALLER.md / template/manifest.json; docs/ labelled as generated, not installed). Homepage copy-button click behaviour is inferred-from-source (Clipboard path reviewed; not clicked in a browser here). The interactive functionality map (overview first screen) was verified by rendering the overview in both modes and driving the map in a headless browser (expand, list toggle, double-click-to-docs, mobile fallback). The installer (install.php) and bootstrap command were traced from source and exercised end-to-end: dry-run and real install into a scratch repository, an upgrade run preserving .vibekb/, and bootstrap repairing a damaged workspace; the scaffolded starter model validates with 0 errors. The cPanel host and Cursor discovery are inferred/not-verified as noted per record.
provenance.freshness_note: VibeKB does not update this model on its own. An AI agent keeps it synchronized while developing VibeKB, following the workflow in CLAUDE.md. `source_commit` records the commit the model was last reconciled against; run `php tools/vibekb.php check` to see what has changed since — drift is detected mechanically, but interpreting a change into the model still requires an agent.

structure.project: project/ — identity, intent, current state, constraints
structure.system: system/ — mental model, components, flows, storage, deployment
structure.memory: memory/ — decisions, constraints, assumptions, warnings, discoveries, changes
structure.work: work/ — current AI work, handoff, sessions
